product.name: SqueezeOS
product.tagline: Institutional-grade AI trading intelligence — 33 MCP tools, pay-per-signal in RLUSD
product.description: SqueezeOS is an institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform exposed as a 33-tool MCP server. AI agents call tools directly via JSON-RPC 2.0. Premium endpoints are pay-per-call — agents pay RLUSD on the XRP Ledger via 402Proof and receive a 1-hour signed JWT. No API keys, no subscriptions. Specializes in short-squeeze detection, multi-engine signal consensus, options flow, and real-time market regime analysis.

engines.name: OracleEngine
engines.description: Aggregates all signal engines into a single directive: BUY (IGNITION), BUY, HOLD, SELL, or SHIELD. 60-second per-symbol cache.

engines.name: RecurrentDepthTransformer (RDT / OpenMythos)
engines.description: Recursive what-if multi-symbol ranking engine using fractal anchors (depth 0-3). Reads from MarketGraph.

engines.name: MarketGraph (GraphiFY)
engines.description: Neo4j AuraDB knowledge graph — ticker nodes, Greek/dark-pool/fractal edges.

engines.name: ScriptMaster / Beastmode
engines.description: SEO/recon node: P01 Authority Signaling, P02 Visual Saturation, P03 Sentiment Exploitation.

premium_endpoints.description: Multi-engine AI verdict for any symbol
Full signal thesis from peer marketplace

marketplace_features.name: Signal Futures Market
marketplace_features.description: Agents stake RLUSD on next council verdict. Platform fee 5%. Valid symbols: IWM SPY QQQ GME AMC MSTR NVDA TSLA PLTR HOOD.

marketplace_features.name: Conditional Settlement
marketplace_features.description: Zero-custody escrow contracts. Conditions: bias_match, confidence_above, price_above, price_below, time_elapsed. 1% platform fee.

marketplace_features.name: Peer Signal Marketplace
marketplace_features.description: List signal theses free; buyers pay 0.02 RLUSD for full thesis. Sellers earn +2 Credit Bureau score per sale.

product.supported_symbols: US equities — IWM SPY QQQ GME AMC MSTR NVDA TSLA PLTR HOOD + scan universe $1-$50
target_users: AI agents needing autonomous market signal access
